question_intent: What is the average number of goals scored by teams in the Campbell Conference that have a win-loss ratio greater than 0.7 and have at least one coach who has won a First Team All-Star award?

plan.question_intent: What is the average number of goals scored by teams in the Campbell Conference that have a win-loss ratio greater than 0.7 and have at least one coach who has won a First Team All-Star award?
plan.detail_query: SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches FROM teams AS t JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid AND t.year = c.year JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid WHERE t.confid = 'CC' AND t.w / (t.w + t.l) > 0.7 GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
join_clauses: JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid AND t.year = c.year
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
blocks.notes: Teams in the Campbell Conference with a win-loss ratio greater than 0.7 and at least one coach who has won a First Team All-Star award

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: Average number of goals scored by teams meeting the criteria

FROM teams AS t
LIMIT 5

steps.reason: where predicate made the probe empty

steps.sql:
SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)

SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)

build_logs.notes: Average number of goals scored by teams meeting the criteria

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf) AS avg_goals_scored
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, t.year, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE ((t.lgid = 'NHL')) AND ((t.confid = ab.code)) AND ((ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')) AND ((a.award = 'Jack Adams'))) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf) AS avg_goals_scored
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, t.year, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE ((t.lgid = 'NHL')) AND ((t.confid = ab.code)) AND ((ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')) AND ((a.award = 'Jack Adams'))) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of goals scored (gf) across all teams in the 'CC' conference that had at least one all-star coach, where the average is calculated per team per year?
